subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! If thou desirest to enter the assemblage of them that are endued with mystic knowledge, thou must needs purify thy soul from whatsoever the hearts of men do abhor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی ان ترید ان تدخل فی مجلس العارفین تهذب نفسک عن کل ما یکرهه النفوس و
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @courtesy; culture [adab], @wisdom [hikmat], @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
